text: {"claims":[{"statement":"University of Nairobi is listed as a university in Kenya.","claimType":"definitional","quote":"- [University of Nairobi](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/University_of_Nairobi \"University of Nairobi\")","entailment":"The quoted list entry shows University of Nairobi among the Kenyan institutions, supporting the claim that it is listed as a university in Kenya.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"National University of Lesotho is listed as a university in Lesotho.","claimType":"definitional","quote":"- [National University of Lesotho](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/National_University_of_Lesotho \"National University of Lesotho\")","entailment":"The quoted line under the Lesotho flag includes National University of Lesotho, confirming it is listed as a university in Lesotho.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"University of Bamako is listed as a university in Mali.","claimType":"definitional","quote":"- [University of Bamako](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/University_of_Bamako \"University of Bamako\")","entailment":"The quoted entry appears under the Mali flag, indicating University of Bamako is listed as a university in Mali.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"}]}
